name: Saraiki
notes: Saraiki (سرائیکی) of Pakistan, written in the Saraiki Shahmukhi alphabet — an extended Perso-Arabic abjad, with additional letters for the implosive consonants ɓ ɗ ʄ ɠ that are the language's most distinctive feature. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. INPUT CONTRACT: as with all Arabic-script languages, short vowels are normally left unwritten, so a correct spec depends either on vowelised (diacritic-bearing) input or on a lexicon; neither is provided here. Metadata only.
